text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Some time has passed since I<n>became Sasami
Anshinzawa's<n>acupuncture test dummy.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
After heading out with her, I would<n>train to
become more<n>Umamusume-like and receive<n>
acupuncture treatment. One such<n>day...

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Good, good! ♪ Your body's shaping<n>up just the
way I like! ♪

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Now you should be able to participate<n>on that
legendary stage that everyone<n>dreams of—

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: The Needle Series!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: What?! You've never heard of it?!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
The Needle Series is the highlight of<n>the
acupuncture world, where<n>
acupuncture-augmented humans are<n>pitted
against each other in races!
choice_data_list: And... you want me to participate in it?
And... you want me to participate in it?

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Precisely! ♪ We're an unstoppable<n>duo together,
with you as the runner<n>and me as the trainer! Our
victory is<n>practically guaranteed!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
...Why, what's this? You don't seem<n>all that
excited!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Listen, once you experience running<n>in a race
yourself, you'll be able to<n>apply what you learn
in your trainee's<n>training sessions!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Watching a race and running one are<n>two
completely different things!<n>Haven't you realized
this from your<n>training up till now? You must
have!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Don't you want <chrname> to<n>improve? Don't
you want to help her<n>achieve her dreams?!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Well then, you have no choice but to<n>enter this
competition! Then you'll<n>have no worries in the
world! ♪

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
That's the spirit! All right, it's<n>decided! Now that
that's finalized,<n>let's go get you signed up! ♪

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
If you manage to win it all, people will<n>come to
recognize my skills too, so<n>it'll be two birds with
one stone! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
And that's how my partnership with<n>Sasami
Anshinzawa begins!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Now then, our goal is to dominate the<n>Needle
Series, and to do that, we'll<n>have to win the
Sasabari Sho! ☆

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Of course, you can't enter it right<n>away—you'll
need to accumulate<n>plenty of racing experience
to qualify!
choice_data_list: I-I wasn't expecting this series to be so legit...

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
First off, let's set our sights on<n>winning the
Bamboo Stakes! ♪ Aaand<n>to do that...

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
You're going to have to undergo<n>more advanced
training. ♪ I'd say<n>we'll need to ramp training up
to level<n>five!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Do a volleyball dive!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Next up, some rapid doggy paddling!<n>Wow,
you're crazy fast! ☆

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Karate chop that tile! Yaaah! No<n>worries!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
No worries! No worries! Good, keep<n>pulling that
tire in time with the chant! ♪

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Lastly, you will face me in shogi! Do<n>you have
what it takes to—no way, did<n>you just put me in
check already?!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Hey, great job toda—whoa! You're<n>looking pretty
burnt-out!
choice_data_list: My body can't handle any more of this...

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! ♪ Don't worry, you can count<n>on your
dear trainer to provide an<n>extra special treatment
as a reward<n>for your hard work! ☆

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: To the infirmary! Let's go, go, go!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Now, this is the Rest in Peace chakra,<n>and when I
poke it, all your fatigue will<n>be washed away! ♪
choice_data_list: That's not a very reassuring name...

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Oh come on, don't be like that! Thetexts I read definitely described itthat way!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Enough chitchat! Annnd poke!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
When I come to my senses, I find<n>myself
standing in an unfamiliar place.<n>The last thing I
remember, I was<n>receiving acupuncture
treatment, but...
Trainer... Trainer, canst thou hear me?

I am the god of acupuncture... Ye who<n>seeketh
the zenith of the Needle<n>Series, I hereby bestow
upon thee<n>mine blessings...

text_block_list.name: God of Acupuncture(?)
text_block_list.text:
O Trainer, dost thou desireth the<n>power to attain
glory?

text_block_list.name: God of Acupuncture(?)
text_block_list.text:
Nay, thou needn't answer, for I know<n>thou
cravest it so. Very well, allow me<n>to fulfill thy
desire!

text_block_list.name: God of Acupuncture(?)
text_block_list.text: Annnd poketh!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Puncture Perfect!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
An almighty feeling flows throughout<n>my body.
So this is the power<n>bestowed by the gods!
choice_data_list: O kindly god, thank you so much!

text_block_list.name: God of Acupuncture(?)
text_block_list.text:
Hohoho... Whilst thou art at it, please<n>look after
that fool of an acupuncturist<n>as well...

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Oh, you're finally awake. I bet you<n>feel nice and
refreshed, don't you?<n>Looks like it was a great
success!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Whatever that was, my body is<n>feeling better
than ever. All traces of<n>my fatigue seem to have
vanished.

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
I knew it all along—acupuncture is the<n>solution to
everything! ♪ No worries! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
So this is the power bestowed by the<n>gods? It's
not quite as miraculous as I<n>thought it'd be.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
If anything, I feel as though my vitality<n>is being
steadily drained from my<n>body!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Wha—? That's strange... There's no<n>way that I,
divine acupuncturist as I<n>am, would ever slip up
during<n>treatment!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Eh, whatever! Thank you for your<n>patronage, and
come again! ☆

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Oh, you're finally awake. You were<n>tossing and
turning in your sleep a lot.

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Anyways, I'm heading on home! See<n>you!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
I missed that chakra point by a<n>millimeter, but that
probably didn't<n>cause any lasting issues, right?!
Nah,<n>definitely not!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I don't know whether to blame the<n>botched
acupuncture or the weird<n>dream, but either way...
My fatigue<n>doesn't improve in the slightest.
